editionData.title: May 31, 2026: Some Iranians abroad say they’d fight for the regime. Others want to topple it.; A court in Kenya blocks U.S. plan to...
editionData.description: Global headlines: Some Iranians abroad say they’d fight for the regime. Others want to topple it. (Members of the diaspora in Iraq, from Sunni Muslim Kurds in the north to Shiite Persians in the south, are as divided over the war as Iranians back home); A court in Kenya blocks U.S. plan to keep American Ebola patients in Africa (A facility built by the U.S. military on a Kenyan air base was intended to isolate Americans exposed to Ebola during the growing outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo); and After a brutal winter, Ukraine’s drones are breaking Russian defenses (Russia’s advance has suddenly stalled, and Ukraine is fighting on its own terms — a comeback credited to Kyiv’s efforts to steadily strengthen the capabilities of its UAVs). Markets leaned higher, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 2.53% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Microsoft degrades functionality of perpetually-licensed offline products (Microsoft Office 2019 and 2021 for Mac view-only conversion (2026) is a scheduled remote degradation of perpetually-licensed Microsoft...); Domain expertise has always been the real moat (Personal website for Aaron Brethorst - Seattleite, technology leader, photographer, transit enthusiast, erstwhile non-runner); and Shantell Sans (2023) (A new typeface from Shantell Martin). Product Hunt features Step 3.7 Flash (Flash-speed agents model that can see and act), Openstatus MCP Health Checker (Test MCP servers like a real AI client, not just a ping), and Exstats (Track your browser extensions and competitors in one place).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Some Iranians abroad say they’d fight for the regime. Others want to topple it.
headlines.summary: Members of the diaspora in Iraq, from Sunni Muslim Kurds in the north to Shiite Persians in the south, are as divided over the war as Iranians back home.

headlines.title: A court in Kenya blocks U.S. plan to keep American Ebola patients in Africa
headlines.summary: A facility built by the U.S. military on a Kenyan air base was intended to isolate Americans exposed to Ebola during the growing outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

headlines.title: After a brutal winter, Ukraine’s drones are breaking Russian defenses
headlines.summary: Russia’s advance has suddenly stalled, and Ukraine is fighting on its own terms — a comeback credited to Kyiv’s efforts to steadily strengthen the capabilities of its UAVs.

headlines.title: Following Trump’s China visit, Hegseth calls for ‘quiet’ defense plan in Asia
headlines.summary: The defense secretary touted better relations with Beijing, but critics said the administration is neglecting Asian allies’ security concerns.

headlines.title: Russian drone hits building in NATO member Romania, drawing outcry from U.S., allies
headlines.summary: Romanian authorities said a Russian drone hit the roof of an apartment block and exploded, potentially raising tensions between Moscow and European nations.

headlines.title: Lebanon slams Israel’s ‘scorched earth policy’; US-Iran deal in limbo
headlines.summary: Lebanese PM describes Israel's attacks as collective punishment as US warns Iran of strikes if no deal is reached.

headlines.title: US Congress advances American-Israeli military integration plan
headlines.summary: A provision in the 2027 draft US defence bill could bind the two countries' weapons industries closer than ever.

headlines.title: Iran reasserts control over Hormuz Strait as deal with US remains elusive
headlines.summary: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth says US 'more than capable' of restarting war if satisfactory deal not reached.

headlines.title: Two killed, including Palestinian doctor, in Israeli attacks on Gaza
headlines.summary: Several injured in Gaza, while Israeli settlers attack Palestinian homes and property across the occupied West Bank.

headlines.title: Confirmed Ebola cases nearly double in days as WHO chief visits DR Congo
headlines.summary: WHO's Tedros calls for a community-led fight as a rare Ebola strain spreads rapidly through conflict-hit eastern DRC.

headlines.title: Immigrant detainees sue over 'horrific' conditions at Texas ICE facility
headlines.summary: Immigrant detainees accuse the federal government of 'inhumane' abuse and treatment at Camp East Montana in El Paso, Texas.

headlines.title: Judge agrees to review Trump's $1.8 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund
headlines.summary: The fund has sparked a broad backlash since it was announced earlier this month, exposing fractures within the Republican Party.

headlines.title: PSG wins back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout victory against Arsenal
headlines.summary: Paris Saint-Germain has won back-to-back Champions League titles by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Budapest.

headlines.title: Pride celebrations struggle as corporate sponsorships dry up
headlines.summary: Public support for the LGBTQ+ community by corporations has become politically risky, public relations expert says.

headlines.title: Carcass of Timmy the humpback whale brought to shore in Denmark
headlines.summary: The humpback whale, nicknamed "Timmy" by German media, died following a controversial failed rescue effort. His carcass had been drifting near the Danish shore for two weeks.

headlines.title: One German mayor's enduring love for Huangshan
headlines.summary: On what was China Daily reporter Xia Ji's first time in Huangshan, Anhui, she met a German mayor visiting the city for his fourth time. Alexander Badrow's connection to Huangshan dates back to 2015, when Huangshan and the Baltic Sea port of Stralsund became sister cities. Over the past decade, Badrow has collaborated with partners in Huangshan to preserve ancient architecture, safeguard cultural heritage and foster an enduring friendship. Click for more about why this German mayor remains deeply committed to Huangshan.

headlines.title: India swelters under severe hot weather
headlines.summary: An excruciating pre-monsoon heat wave is baking large parts of India, with temperatures routinely breaching 45 C and topping 47 C in many states, causing human and economic distress and even some deaths due to heatstroke.

headlines.title: Steel tariffs open 'can of worms', drive up prices
headlines.summary: The humble tin can is the latest victim of US steel tariffs as domestic manufacturers say producing cans at home has become more expensive than importing them, despite Washington's push to bolster steel production and limit imports.

headlines.title: France extends nuclear umbrella to Norway
headlines.summary: Norway will begin talks on joining a France-led nuclear deterrence program, the countries' leaders announced, a move that, if concluded, would be a notable shift for a traditionally Atlanticist nation long aligned with the United States on security.

headlines.title: China-US cooperation stressed after summit
headlines.summary: Leading scholars from China and the United States are stressing the importance of seizing the opportunity to improve bilateral ties ushered in by the summit between the two countries earlier this month.

headlines.title: Government unveils AI-enabled chatbot to help people lodge complaints
headlines.summary: The Indian government launches 'Samadhan Didi', an AI chatbot for citizens to easily lodge grievances in any language.

headlines.title: Only 15.3% children aged 6-23 months receive adequate diet: NFHS-6
headlines.summary: NFHS-6 reveals only 15.3% of children 6-23 months receive adequate diets, with declining exclusive breastfeeding rates raising concerns.

headlines.title: NEET paper leak: Court extends Hawaldar's CBI custody by two days; remands Mandhare to judicial custody
headlines.summary: Delhi court extends CBI custody for NEET paper leak accused, remands another to judicial custody amid ongoing investigations.

headlines.title: West Bengal Cabinet expansion on June 1
headlines.summary: West Bengal's Cabinet expansion on June 1 will prioritize seniority, experience, and regional representation among over 30 new Ministers.

headlines.title: Fair electoral rolls lead to fair polls: CEC
headlines.summary: Chief Election Commissioner emphasises the importance of fair electoral rolls for ensuring fair elections during a national conference.

headlines.title: US military says it turned away blockade runner trying to reach Iranian port
headlines.summary: Reuters: US military says it turned away blockade runner trying to reach Iranian port.

headlines.title: Trump to headline 250th anniversary fair opening after performers drop out
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump to headline 250th anniversary fair opening after performers drop out.

headlines.title: US planning faster troop withdrawal from Europe, newspaper says
headlines.summary: Reuters: US planning faster troop withdrawal from Europe, newspaper says.

headlines.title: Austrian protesters shut vital motorway connecting Germany to Italy
headlines.summary: Reuters: Austrian protesters shut vital motorway connecting Germany to Italy.

headlines.title: Russia says Ukrainian drone struck Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant, Kyiv denies
headlines.summary: Reuters: Russia says Ukrainian drone struck Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant, Kyiv denies.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Accenture to acquire Ookla
hackerNews.summary: Accenture has entered into an agreement to acquire Ookla, a global leader in network intelligence, competitive benchmarking and customer experience analytics.

hackerNews.title: Cheese Paper: a text editor specifically designed for writing
hackerNews.summary: Organized text editor for writing fiction

hackerNews.title: wolfSSL releases a new product; wolfCOSE a zero alloc C embbedded COSE stack
hackerNews.summary: A fast, portable, and lightweight COSE + CBOR implementation for embedded systems. Supports PQC, FIPS 140-3, DO-178, and MISRA C. Powered by wolfSSL. - wolfSSL/wolfCOSE

hackerNews.title: Jef Raskin, the Visionary Behind the Mac (2013)
hackerNews.summary: Jef Raskin founded the Macintosh project at Apple, which led to the development of the Apple Mac and the popularisation of the graphical user-interface. He was Apple employee #31 and left the Macintosh team in mid-1981 after Steve Jobs took over the project. Jason Walsh: Before the Mac you were a professor of music. As […]

hackerNews.title: The AV2 Video Standard Has Released (Final v1.0 Specification)
hackerNews.summary: AV2 is the next-generation video coding specification from the Alliance for Open Media (AOMedia). Building on the foundation of AV1, AV2 is engineered to provide superior compression efficiency, enabling high-quality video delivery at significantly lower bitrates. It is optimized for the evolving demands of streaming, broadcasting, and real-time video conferencing.

hackerNews.title: Voxel Space (2017)
hackerNews.summary: Terrain rendering algorithm in less than 20 lines of code
